mapper.select: SELECT dict_label AS label, dict_value AS value FROM sys_dict_data WHERE dict_type = 'formula' ORDER BY dict_sort
SELECT dict_label AS label, dict_value AS value FROM sys_dict_data WHERE dict_type = 'formula_element' ORDER BY dict_sort
SELECT id, name, type, cformula, eformula, seq, is_enabled, create_time FROM mt_formula_file WHERE type = #{type} AND is_enabled = '1' ORDER BY seq, create_time DESC
